description:
JSON payload written to stdin for `Potter.ProjectStop` command hooks.

The generated schema fixture is derived from this type, so field names and requiredness define the contract between CodexPotter and external hook commands.

all_assistant_messages.description: Final assistant messages for every recorded round.

all_session_ids.description: Session IDs for every round recorded in the project.

cwd.description: Working directory used for hook discovery and as the hook process CWD.

new_assistant_messages.description: Final assistant messages for rounds completed since the current resume boundary.

new_session_ids.description:
Session IDs for rounds completed since the current resume boundary.

This may include a reused thread id when resume continues an unfinished round.

project_dir.description: Absolute path to the project directory containing `MAIN.md`.

project_file_path.description: Absolute path to the project progress file (`MAIN.md`).

stop_reason_code.description: Stable stop reason code such as `succeeded` or `budget_exhausted`.

user_prompt.description: Original user prompt captured when the project started.

title: potter-project-stop.command.input
